mapper.select: /* 포인트 충전 주문: 주문번호로 행 잠금 조회 */ SELECT PT_CHG_ORD_SN AS ptChgOrdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, PT_CHG_ORD_NO AS ptChgOrdNo, PT_CHG_ORD_AMT AS ptChgOrdAmt, PT_CHG_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptChgOrdStatusCd, PT_CHG_ORD_PG_KEY AS ptChgOrdPgKey, PT_LDG_SN AS ptLdgSn, PT_CHG_ORD_FAIL_RSN_CN AS ptChgOrdFailRsnCn, PT_CHG_ORD_REG_DT AS ptChgOrdRegDt, PT_CHG_ORD_UPDT_DT AS ptChgOrdUpdtDt FROM POINT_CHARGE_ORDER WHERE PT_CHG_ORD_NO = #{ptChgOrdNo} FOR UPDATE

/* 포인트 충전 주문: 내 주문 목록 (최신순 100건) */ SELECT O.PT_CHG_ORD_SN AS ptChgOrdSn, O.USR_SN AS usrSn, O.PT_CHG_ORD_NO AS ptChgOrdNo, O.PT_CHG_ORD_AMT AS ptChgOrdAmt, O.PT_CHG_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptChgOrdStatusCd, O.PT_LDG_SN AS ptLdgSn, O.PT_CHG_ORD_FAIL_RSN_CN AS ptChgOrdFailRsnCn, O.PT_CHG_ORD_REG_DT AS ptChgOrdRegDt, O.PT_CHG_ORD_UPDT_DT AS ptChgOrdUpdtDt, S.CMM_NM AS statusNm FROM POINT_CHARGE_ORDER O JOIN CMM_CODE S ON S.CMM_CD = O.PT_CHG_ORD_STATUS_CD WHERE O.USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY O.PT_CHG_ORD_SN DESC LIMIT 100

/* 포인트 충전 주문: 대사 배치 대상 조회 (PENDING이면서 cutoff보다 오래된 건) */ SELECT PT_CHG_ORD_SN AS ptChgOrdSn, USR_SN AS usrSn, PT_CHG_ORD_NO AS ptChgOrdNo, PT_CHG_ORD_AMT AS ptChgOrdAmt, PT_CHG_ORD_STATUS_CD AS ptChgOrdStatusCd, PT_CHG_ORD_PG_KEY AS ptChgOrdPgKey, PT_LDG_SN AS ptLdgSn, PT_CHG_ORD_FAIL_RSN_CN AS ptChgOrdFailRsnCn, PT_CHG_ORD_REG_DT AS ptChgOrdRegDt, PT_CHG_ORD_UPDT_DT AS ptChgOrdUpdtDt FROM POINT_CHARGE_ORDER WHERE PT_CHG_ORD_STATUS_CD = 'PCOC0001' AND PT_CHG_ORD_REG_DT < #{cutoff}
